headline: Jabil Inc. (NYSE:JBL) Shows Strong Growth and Technical Breakout Setup
summary: When screening for strong growth stocks, Jabil Inc. (JBL) stands out with a perfect 10/10 technical rating, 39.98% EPS growth, and strong profitability, signaling a high-potential breakout opportunity.
